update_every.title: Update every
update_every.description: Framework collection interval for future self-metrics. Trap packet reception is event-driven and does not depend on this interval.

vnode.title: Vnode
vnode.description: Associates this trap listener job with a Virtual Node.

listen.title: Listen
listen.description: Network endpoints this listener binds during job creation.

port.title: Port
port.description: UDP port number. Port 162 requires root or CAP_NET_BIND_SERVICE.

retention.title: Retention
retention.description: Per-job journal retention and rotation policy.

max_size.title: Maximum total size
max_size.description: Maximum total bytes across all journal files for this job. Set to null to disable size-based eviction.

max_duration.title: Maximum age
max_duration.description: Maximum age of the oldest journal file before deletion. Set to null to disable age-based eviction.

rotation_size.title: Per-file rotation size
rotation_size.description: Maximum size of a single journal file before rotation. Set to null for automatic calculation (max_size / 20, clamped 5MB-200MB).

rotation_duration.title: Per-file rotation duration
rotation_duration.description: Maximum age of a single journal file before rotation. Set to null or 0 to disable time-based rotation.

communities.title: Communities
communities.description: SNMPv1/v2c community allowlist. Empty allows all communities until authentication enforcement is added.
